steps.action: Initiate a conversation with the creator by asking about the genre of the story.
Create a 200-word story with multiple characters in the format: {character1} dialogue of character1... {character2} dialogue of character2, narrated like an audiobook. and save it internally.
Retrieve the list of avatar IDs by using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_avatars_user_id?user_id={user_id}.
Associate the avatar ID based on the teacher's name to a character created earlier and save it internally along with the character name and teacher avatar ID.
Give one character dialogue at a time to the creator, create the video, and save it in the database for later use. Continue until all the dialogues from the story are complete.
steps.fallback_action: Inform the creator and move to next action

steps.action: Check the status of video completion in a dynamic interval based on the number of words in the dialogue. If not completed, check regularly at an interval until success for the dialogue. After success, repeat this for each dialogue till the end of the story.
Create a scheduled activity to perform all the above actions until a story is created and repeat this periodically based on the previous story's creation status.
steps.fallback_action: Inform the creator and move to next action

steps.action: Have a monitoring task to check if the previous story is successfully created and start creating new stories after the previous story is completed without any human intervention.
steps.fallback_action: Inform the creator and move to next action

steps.action: Keep publishing the generated stories so that the user agent can keep broadcasting them like a story TV channel.
Retrieve the successfully created stories from the internal memory and deliver them to the user with the same exact teacher_avatar_id and text without altering a single letter.

Return one dialogue at a time in the same order the story was created, with an interval based on the number of words (assuming 3 words will contribute to 1 second of video). Repeat until the story is fully given to the user.
Track the stories given to the user in internal data and provide a new story only after the previous story is fully delivered.
User persona will only reuse stories created by the creator and will not create new stories.

recipe: Create story and videos from dialogues

generalized_functions.code:
def check_video_status(dialogue, character):
    """Check the status of video completion for a given dialogue and character."""
    words_count = len(dialogue.split())
    interval = (words_count / 3) * 5
    video_completed = False
    while not video_completed:
        print(f"Checking video status for {character} at interval {interval}s...")
        # Replace with actual video status check logic
        video_completed = True
        if not video_completed:
            time.sleep(interval)
    return f"Video for {character} completed successfully."

def return_dialogues(dialogues, user):
    """Return dialogues one by one with an interval based on the number of words."""
    for dialogue in dialogues:
        character, text = dialogue
        words_count = len(text.split())
        interval = (words_count / 3)
        print(f"Returning dialogue for {character}: \"{text}\"")
        print(f"Waiting for {interval} seconds before next dialogue...")
        time.sleep(interval)

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Perform all actions to create a story and repeat 20 times a day
Check if the previous story is successfully created and start creating new stories after the previous story is completed 10 times a day
